title: SMYRC RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET SMYRC RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community calendar of events focused on creating art, playing music, joining open mic nights, attending drag shows, and participating in support groups. Additional services include a food pantry, hygiene items, a clothing closet, gender-affirming clothing, and referrals to other resources and support. 1220 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as LGBTQIA2S+ Hours: Varies by event Email (503) 872-9664 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 872-9664 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the lower level of the building. Use the side door next to the parking lot and press the buzzer to enter. Services: Community Calendars * LGBTQ2+ Youth Food Pantries * LGBTQ2+ Youth General Clothing Provision * LGBTQ2+ Youth Personal/Grooming Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - AVENUES TO COLLEGE HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITIONAL HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET
